<cfscript>

mapper()
    .namespace("api")
        .namespace("v2")
            // Route name:  apiV2Products
            // Example URL: /api/v2/products/1234
            // Controller:  api.v2.Products
            .resources("products")
        .end()

        .namespace("v1")
            // Route name:  apiV1Users
            // Example URL: /api/v1/users
            // Controller:  api.v1.Users
            .get(name="users", to="users##index")
        .end()
    .end()

    // Custom package and path: name="foo", package="foos", path="foose"
    // The `path` argument overrides the default URL prefix (which would be "foo").
    // The `package` argument overrides the default controller subfolder (which would be "foo").
    .namespace(name="foo", package="foos", path="foose")
        // Route name:  fooBars
        // Example URL: /foose/bars
        // Controller:  foos.Bars
        .post(name="bars", to="bars##create")
    .end()
.end();

</cfscript>
